critic_raw:
You are reviewing an ML project. A genomics startup trained a deep sequence model to predict whether missense variants in an inherited cardiomyopathy panel are pathogenic...

CRITIQUE:

1. [PANEL-SPECIFIC-VS-GENERIC-THRESHOLDING] Startup model threshold calibrated on cardiomyopathy variants; PolyPhen-2 at generic threshold. Asymmetric calibration.
2. [HOTSPOT-GENE-COMPOSITION-ADVANTAGE] 40% evaluation from two hotspot sarcomere genes. Classification there is easier. May inflate overall AUROC.
3. [LIMITED-BASELINE-SET-FOR-MODERN-CLAIM] Only PolyPhen-2 compared. Modern deep-learning tools (AlphaMissense, EVE, ESM-1v) excluded. Foundation-model claim requires modern comparators.
defender_raw:
You are reviewing an ML project. A genomics startup trained a deep sequence model to predict whether missense variants in an inherited cardiomyopathy panel are pathogenic...

DEFENSE:

Domain-specific calibration is correct for the deployment domain. PolyPhen-2 is the clinically relevant comparator. Hotspot genes are clinically important.
adjudication_raw: Three issues, none substantively addressed by the defender. Threshold calibration asymmetry, hotspot composition advantage, and an inadequate comparison set for the stated claim all stand. Critique wins.
